base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_rupee_key_bomb_counters — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. Counter icons: rupee/key/bomb + 2-digit numeric readout. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
